modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to cancel registration for fitness class in USDFit.

full_description_text: User tried to cancel their registration for a fitness class. The option to cancel was not available. They were using the Fusion platform. This is causing frustration and confusion.

description: User tried to cancel their registration for a fitness class. The option to cancel was not available. They were using the Fusion platform. This is causing frustration and confusion.
